text: A bicycle operated on a roadway, or the shoulder of a highway, shall be operated in the same direction as vehicles are required to be driven upon the roadway.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 3. Driving, Overtaking, and Passing [21650 - 21761]
#### Article 1. Driving on Right Side [21650 - 21664]
##### § 21650.1

A bicycle operated on a roadway, or the shoulder of a highway, shall be operated in the same direction as vehicles are required to be driven upon the roadway.

*(Added by Stats. 1988, Ch. 58, Sec. 2.)*

subsections.text: A bicycle operated on a roadway, or the shoulder of a highway, shall be operated in the same direction as vehicles are required to be driven upon the roadway.
